# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that creates releases and publishes packages. On version tags, build the application, create a GitHub release, and publish to npm/PyPI. Make the release process fully automated so developers can just push tags to trigger releases.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Release & Publish

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - 'v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+'
      - 'v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+-**' # Supports pre-release tags like v1.0.0-beta.1

jobs:
  release:
    name: Create Release & Publish Package
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    permissions:
      contents: write # Required to create GitHub Releases
      packages: write # Required if publishing to GitHub Packages
      id-token: write # Required for PyPI publishing with trusted publishers (OIDC)

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      # Setup Node.js for npm package publishing (uncomment and configure if using npm)
      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 'lts/*' # Use the latest LTS Node.js version
          registry-url: 'https://registry.npmjs.org/' # Important for npm publish to work with NODE_AUTH_TOKEN

      # Setup Python for PyPI package publishing (uncomment and configure if using PyPI)
      # - name: Setup Python
      #   uses: actions/setup-python@v5
      #   with:
      #     python-version: '3.x' # Use your desired Python version

      # Install dependencies (choose based on your project, e.g., npm or pip)
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci
        # Or for Python:
        # run: pip install -e .

      # Build application (choose based on your project)
      - name: Build application
        run: npm run build
        # Or for Python:
        # run: python setup.py sdist bdist_wheel

      # Create GitHub Release
      - name: Create GitHub Release
        id: create_release
        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v1
        with:
          name: Release ${{ github.ref_name }}
          tag_name: ${{ github.ref_name }}
          body: |
            ## Release Notes for ${{ github.ref_name }}

            This is an automated release.
            Please refer to the commit history for detailed changes since the last release.
          # If your build step produces artifacts, attach them to the release.
          # Example:
          # files: |
          #   dist/*.zip
          #   dist/*.tar.gz
          prerelease: ${{ contains(github.ref_name, '-') }} # Marks release as pre-release if tag contains a hyphen (e.g., v1.0.0-beta.1)
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }} # This token is automatically provided by GitHub Actions

      # Publish to npm (uncomment and configure if publishing to npm)
      - name: Publish to npm
        run: npm publish --access public
        env:
          NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }} # Ensure you have an NPM_TOKEN secret in your repository or organization

      # Publish to PyPI (uncomment and configure if publishing to PyPI)
      # - name: Publish to PyPI
      #   uses: pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish@release/v1
      #   with:
      #     user: __token__
      #     password: ${{ secrets.PYPI_API_TOKEN }} # Ensure you have a PYPI_API_TOKEN secret in your repository or organization
      #     # If your package is not in the default 'dist/' directory, adjust 'packages-dir'
      #     # packages-dir: build/dist/
      #     # Optionally, publish to Test PyPI
      #     # repository-url: https://test.pypi.org/legacy/
